## Testing

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run type-check`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run test:encryption` (if encryption changes)

## Checklist

- [ ] No plaintext sensitive data logged
- [ ] Sync queue updated for new writes
- [ ] Migrations updated if schema changed
- [ ] RLS policies updated if new Supabase tables added
